QW-451  PROCEDURE QUALIFICATION THICKNESS LIMITS AND TEST SPECIMENS. (a) The thickness of the test coupon determines the qualified range as required by Table QW-451. (b) For groove welds, a coupon of thickness T qualifies for base metal from the table minimum to a maximum of 2T, except as permitted by this paragraph for certain configurations. (c) Test specimens shall be prepared in accordance with QW-452. Tests shall meet the requirements of QW-150 and QW-160. The WPS shall specify the qualified thickness range as required by QW-200. See also QW-310 for performance ranges, which are subject to different limits.
